case_title: MAZERIS, JEANNE vs. FOREMAN, BETTY JANE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZERIS, JEANNE SERVED FEB-19-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOREMAN, BETTY JANE
